Speech.Name: The God of this world.
Speech.Text: And even here, that lazy simpleton Skulmoon hasn't done anything yet((((.++.++.++ But I promise:+ this part will be interesting)))).
Don't you dare to move!.++ Otherwise.++.++.
Ah, a peaceful one.++ You don't even strike back.++ You seem to be made of ore.++ But.++.++.++ Those veins ran dry in these parts long ago.
Follow me.++ Don't you dare try any tricks.++ The Commander will decide what to do with you.

Speech.Name: The God of this world.
Speech.Text: Well)))))),+ I haven't coded a script for this yet.++ So,+ look forward to the next updates!
